entries.claim: A Claude agent skill folder must contain at minimum a SKILL.md file with YAML frontmatter; the frontmatter requires three fields: name (kebab-case slug), description, and license
entries.source_quote_he: Each skill is a single Markdown file (SKILL.md) with YAML frontmatter declaring at minimum the name, description, and license fields.

entries.claim: skills-il publishes metadata in a separate metadata.json file alongside SKILL.md because Claude Desktop rejects YAML frontmatter with keys outside the spec
entries.source_quote_he: Claude Desktop rejects the metadata key in SKILL.md YAML frontmatter. All skills-il metadata (display_name, display_description, tags, author, version, category, supported_agents) lives in a separate metadata.json file alongside SKILL.md.

entries.claim: supported_agents must use canonical slugs: claude-code (not claude), gemini-cli (not gemini); wrong slugs render as empty gray icon circles with no sync-time validation
entries.source_quote_he: supported_agents canonical slugs: Use `claude-code` not `claude`, `gemini-cli` not `gemini`. Wrong slugs render as empty gray icon circles on skill cards. No sync-time validation.

entries.claim: skills-il organizes skills into 12 category repositories under the skills-il GitHub organization
entries.source_quote_he: Twelve category repos: tax-and-finance, localization, government-services, security-compliance, communication, developer-tools, food-and-dining, legal-tech, education, health-services, marketing-growth, accounting.

entries.claim: The trust-score pipeline scans 15 signals across 3 tiers: 5 Critical (spec_compliant, secret_scanning, code_scanning, signed_release, license_spdx), 8 Recommended, 2 Bonus; all 5 Critical passing earns the Verified badge
entries.source_quote_he: GitHub Verification scorecard (15 signals, 3 tiers): Critical 5, Recommended 8, Bonus 2. All 5 Critical passing → green Verified badge, trust tier promoted to verified (≥90).

entries.claim: skills-il catalog currently has approximately 130+ published skills
entries.source_quote_he: Catalog landing page shows 130+ published skills across 12 categories as of May 2026.

entries.claim: skills-il-skill-creator is a published skill (137 installs) that guides developers through scaffolding a new skill for the skills-il organization via interactive Q&A; its description explicitly says 'Do NOT use for editing existing skills or creating skills for non-skills-il platforms'
entries.source_quote_he: Skills-IL Skill Creator. Interactive workflow for creating new skills for the skills-il organization. Do NOT use for editing existing skills or creating skills for non-skills-il platforms.

entries.claim: israeli-id-validator (123 installs) is a small focused skill that uses scripts/ for the Luhn check-digit algorithm
entries.source_quote_he: Israeli Id Validator. Validates Israeli national ID numbers using a Luhn-style check-digit algorithm; ships a TypeScript file under scripts/.

entries.claim: hebrew-seo-geo-toolkit (220 installs) is a high-installs bilingual skill in marketing-growth
entries.source_quote_he: Hebrew SEO & GEO Toolkit. 220 installs as of May 2026. Bilingual SKILL.md and SKILL_HE.md.

entries.claim: israeli-phone-formatter (99 installs) uses references/ for a static lookup table of Israeli phone prefixes (mobile, landline, special-service)
entries.source_quote_he: Israeli Phone Formatter. 99 installs as of May 2026. Uses references/ folder for the area-code lookup table.

entries.claim: The sync pipeline runs on a daily cron and on-demand via GitHub Actions; on first sync a new skill appears in the catalog with is_published=false
entries.source_quote_he: sync.yml runs pnpm sync-skills daily at 6am UTC and on workflow_dispatch. Sync writes skills to Supabase with is_published default false until admin publishes.
